result.reason: Expand the available connection-specific variables for use in external tools, enhancing flexibility and automation.
result.approach: Identify additional relevant properties from the ConnectionInfo object (e.g., LoadBalanceInfo, PrivateKeyPath, RDPStartProgram) and extend the External Tools' variables context menu to include them. Add corresponding unit tests.
